taxonomy.family_description: Mallow family; cotton, hibiscus, cacao, durian

soil.type: Deep loamy or clay-loam 'black cotton soil' (vertisol) preferred

fertilization.npk: N150-P60-K60 for irrigated hybrid Bt cotton
fertilization.schedule: Basal: 50%N+100%P+100%K; Top dressing: 25%N at squaring + 25%N at flowering

harvesting.method: Repeated hand-pickings (3-4 pickings as bolls open); mechanical picking in USA

diseases.pathogen_name: Cotton leaf curl Multan virus (CLCuMV) + betasatellite

symptoms.early: Upward curling of leaves, vein thickening, enations (leaf-like outgrowths) on underside of leaves
symptoms.late: Severe stunting, dark green thickened curled leaves, no boll formation, plant death

treatment.organic: Control whiteflies with neem extract, reflective mulch, remove infected plants
treatment.chemical: Imidacloprid/Thiamethoxam soil application for whitefly control; Acetamiprid foliar spray
treatment.biological: Encarsia formosa, Beauveria bassiana for whitefly control
treatment.preventive: Resistant varieties (NIAB 846, CIM-499), control whiteflies strictly, remove infected plants, use insect-proof nets in nursery

pests.scientific_name: Amrasca biguttula biguttula (Cotton/Okra Leafhopper); Empoasca spp.

control.organic: Neem seed kernel extract 5%, neem oil; yellow sticky traps; Beauveria bassiana spray
control.chemical: Imidacloprid 17.8% SL (0.3ml/L), Lambda-cyhalothrin 5% EC (1ml/L), Thiamethoxam, Dimethoate 30% EC (2ml/L)
control.biological: Anagrus atomus (egg parasitoid in grapes), Gonatocerus ashmeadi, Stethorus ladybugs

pests.damage_type: Leaf and whorl feeding; ear damage

control.organic: Bt-kurstaki or Bt-aizawai spray; fall armyworm pheromone traps; sand+soil in whorl (suffocates larvae); egg mass and larvae hand collection
control.chemical: Emamectin benzoate 5% SG (0.4g/L into whorl), Chlorantraniliprole (Coragen), Spinetoram, Lambda-cyhalothrin (adult moths)
control.biological: Telenomus remus (egg parasitoid), Cotesia icipe, Coccygomimus turionellae, Metarhizium rileyi, NPV (Nuclear Polyhedrosis Virus)

control.organic: Yellow sticky traps, neem oil + soap spray (5ml+2ml per L), reflective mulch, soap water spray, Beauveria bassiana
control.chemical: Imidacloprid 17.8% SL (0.5ml/L), Thiamethoxam 25% WG (0.2g/L), Acetamiprid 20% SP (0.2g/L), Spiromesifen (resistance management)
control.biological: Encarsia formosa (parasitic wasp), Eretmocerus mundus, Macrolophus pygmaeus (predatory bug), Beauveria bassiana

pests.scientific_name: Phenacoccus solenopsis (Cotton Mealybug); Planococcus citri (Citrus Mealybug)

control.organic: Neem oil + soap spray; rubbing alcohol on cotton swabs; strong water spray; remove waxy coating first; Cryptolaemus montrouzieri release
control.chemical: Imidacloprid soil drench (2ml/L), Buprofezin 25% WP (1g/L), Chlorpyrifos 20% EC (2.5ml/L), Acetamiprid + Chlorpyrifos
control.biological: Cryptolaemus montrouzieri (mealybug destroyer beetle), Leptomastix dactylopii (parasitoid wasp), Anagyrus kamali, Acerophagus papayae

pests.scientific_name: Meloidogyne incognita, M. javanica, M. arenaria, M. hapla

control.organic: Marigold (Tagetes spp.) intercropping; neem cake 250kg/ha soil application; Paecilomyces lilacinus inoculant; castor cake; mustard cake; crop rotation with cereals
control.chemical: Carbofuran 3G (33 kg/ha), Phorate 10G, Ethoprophos 10G at planting; soil fumigation with Dazomet or Metam sodium (pre-plant)
control.biological: Purpureocillium lilacinum (formerly Paecilomyces lilacinus), Pochonia chlamydosporia, Trichoderma harzianum, Bacillus firmus (VOTiVO), Steinernema carpocapsae

control.organic: Water spray to wash off; neem oil 5ml/L; wettable sulfur 3g/L; insecticidal soap; predatory mites release; soap solution sprays
control.chemical: Abamectin 1.9% EC (0.5ml/L), Spiromesifen 22.9% SC (1ml/L), Hexythiazox 5% EC (1ml/L), Bifenazate, Clofentezine, Fenpyroximate
control.biological: Phytoseiulus persimilis (excellent predator), Amblyseius californicus, Neoseiulus californicus, Feltiella acarisuga (gall midge)

control.organic: NPV spray (2×10¹² POB/ha); HaNPV + cotton Bt; pheromone traps (1/ha); neem seed kernel extract; Bt-k spray
control.chemical: Emamectin benzoate 5% SG (0.4g/L), Chlorantraniliprole 18.5% SC (0.3ml/L), Indoxacarb, Flubendiamide, Thiodicarb
control.biological: Trichogramma chilonis (egg parasitoid, 1 lakh/ha weekly), Habrobracon hebetor, Chrysoperla carnea, HaNPV

pests.scientific_name: Thrips palmi (Melon Thrips); Frankliniella occidentalis (Western Flower Thrips)

control.organic: Blue sticky traps (most attractive to thrips), spinosad spray, neem oil, kaolin clay, predatory mites (Neoseiulus cucumeris)
control.chemical: Spinosad 45% SC (0.3ml/L), Imidacloprid, Abamectin 1.9% EC (0.5ml/L), Cyantraniliprole, Tolfenpyrad
control.biological: Neoseiulus cucumeris, Amblyseius swirskii (predatory mites); Orius insidiosus (pirate bug); Steinernema feltiae (entomopathogenic nematode) for soil pupae
